title: jss-style-checker: a style checker for Journal of Statistical Software manuscripts
description: A linter for LaTeX / Sweave / R Markdown manuscripts submitted to the Journal of Statistical Software (JSS). One rule engine, shipped as a Python package, a Rust CLI, a browser/npm WebAssembly build, a native Python extension, an R package, a zero-install VS Code extension, and a GitHub Action — with byte-identical output across engines, and per-rule precision measured empirically against a pinned corpus of real JSS manuscripts.
